title: check later
content:
● Review in OpenMaui:

  | Feature Used                   | OpenMaui Support | Notes                         |
  |--------------------------------|------------------|-------------------------------|
  | Controls                       |                  |                               |
  | ContentPage                    | ✓                | SkiaContentPage               |
  | Grid                           | ✓                | SkiaGrid                      |
  | VerticalStackLayout            | ✓                | SkiaStackLayout               |
  | HorizontalStackLayout          | ✓                | SkiaStackLayout               |
  | Label                          | ✓                | SkiaLabel                     |
  | Button                         | ✓                | SkiaButton                    |
  | CheckBox                       | ✓                | SkiaCheckBox                  |
  | ProgressBar                    | ✓                | SkiaProgressBar               |
  | Border                         | ✓                | SkiaBorder                    |
  | CollectionView                 | ✓                | SkiaCollectionView            |
  | XAML Features                  |                  |                               |
  | Data Binding                   | ✓                | Full BindableProperty support |
  | StaticResource                 | ✓                | ResourceDictionary            |
  | DataTemplate                   | ✓                |                               |
  | IValueConverter                | ✓                |                               |
  | Potential Gaps                 |                  |                               |
  | StrokeShape="RoundRectangle 8" | ?                | May need different syntax     |
  | FormattedText / Span           | ?                | Didn't see explicit support   |
  | x:DataType compiled bindings   | ?                | May work, may not             |
  | CollectionView.EmptyView       | ?                | Not confirmed                 |

  Honest assessment: The core controls are there, but I'd need to check:

  1. Does SkiaBorder support StrokeShape with corner radius?
  2. Does SkiaLabel support FormattedText with multiple Span elements?
  3. Does SkiaCollectionView support EmptyView?

  Want me to dig into the OpenMaui source to verify these specific features?
